ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average number of people per household */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households */,
  "major_industries" TEXT /* Major industries in the region (e.g., tech, manufacturing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region associated with the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., unemployment rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "recorded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the indicator was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic data (e.g., government, private agency) */,
  "data_retrieval_date" TEXT /* Date when the economic data was retrieved */,
  "indicator_category" TEXT /* Category of the economic indicator (e.g., employment, income) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., realtor, investor, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company or organization the user is associated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated housing data */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the market trend (e.g., price change percentage) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the market trend */,
  "trend_year" INTEGER /* Year when the trend was recorded */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "trend_category" TEXT /* Category of the trend (e.g., price, sales volume) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparative_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "region_id_a" INTEGER /* ID of the first region in the comparison */,
  "region_id_b" INTEGER /* ID of the second region in the comparison */,
  "comparison_metric" TEXT /* Metric used for comparison (e.g., median house value) */,
  "comparison_value" REAL /* Value of the comparison metric */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_source" TEXT /* Source of the analysis data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparative_analyses_region_id_a FOREIGN KEY ("region_id_a") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparative_analyses_region_id_b FOREIGN KEY ("region_id_b") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., single family, condo) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value of properties of this type */,
  "average_size" INTEGER /* Average size (square feet) of properties of this type */,
  "common_features" TEXT /* Common features of properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the housing data related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, rapid increase) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert triggers */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)
